subcodes.first_line: O radiant countenance of the exalted Primal Point, unto Whom my spirit is a sacrifice! Thou didst become the target of the arrows of cruelty, and the Blessed Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حضرت بیضاء طلعت اعلی نقطه اولی روحی له الفداء هدف تیر جفا گشت و جمال مبارک
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @consolation and comfort, @martyrs and martyrdom
